payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_43ae68e5547f4aee962ba9eb', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\\n\\"\\"\\"Simple calculator that evaluates basic math expressions.\\"\\"\\"\\n\\nimport operator\\nimport re\\n\\nOPERATORS = {\\n    \'+\': operator.add,\\n    \'-\': operator.sub,\\n    \'*\': operator.mul,\\n    \'/\': operator.truediv,\\n}\\n\\ndef evaluate(expression: str) -> float:\\n    \\"\\"\\"Evaluate a simple math expression like \'2 + 3\'.\\"\\"\\"\\n    # Find operator\\n    for op in OPERATORS:\\n        if op in expression:\\n            parts = expression.split(op)\\n            if len(parts) == 2:\\n                a, b = map(float, parts)\\n                return OPERATORS[op](a, b)\\n    raise ValueError(\\"Invalid expression\\")\\n\\nif __name__ == \\"__main__\\":\\n    expr = input(\\"Enter expression: \\")\\n    result = evaluate(expr)\\n    print(result)", "filename": "calculator.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
